googleDriveOAuth2Api.name: Google Drive account vyrazu labs gmail

parameters.content:
## 🚗 Virtual Car Photography Studio (Gemini 2.5 Flash Image)

**Who it's for:**
Dealers, auction houses, and fleet operators who shoot car photos on the lot and want studio-quality, on-brand listing images without hiring a photographer.

**What this does:**
1. Pulls raw car photos from an Input Drive folder, one at a time
2. Pulls your studio backdrop + logo from a Studio Assets folder
3. Gemini classifies each shot as Exterior / Interior / Engine-Detail and treats each differently
4. Exterior shots get composited into your studio backdrop with realistic lighting and shadows
5. Interior/engine shots get a clean solid-color background instead (a studio backdrop wouldn't make sense from these angles)
6. Any visible license plate is replaced with your business logo
7. Final image is uploaded to the Output Drive folder, then the loop moves to the next photo

**Setup required:**
- Connect Google Drive credentials (used by 4 nodes)
- Add your Gemini API key as an n8n Header Auth credential (Name: `x-goog-api-key`) on the "Call Gemini API" node — never paste it directly into the node
- Set your Input, Studio Assets, and Output folder IDs in the Google Drive nodes
- Studio Assets folder must contain exactly two files: `virtual_studio.png` and `logo.png`

**Why the prompt has explicit negative instructions:**
Image models tend to over-embellish — adding reflections under the car or subtly altering its shape/color while re-lighting it. The prompt explicitly forbids both, keeping the output faithful to the real vehicle rather than a "reimagined" one — important for buyer trust in a listing photo.

### ① Grab the Next Car Photo
Lists every image in the Input Drive folder, then processes them one at a time (Loop, batch size 1) so a failure on one photo doesn't break the whole batch. Downloads the binary for the current photo before moving on.

### ② Load Studio Backdrop + Logo
Lists and downloads the two reference images from the Studio Assets folder (virtual_studio.png, logo.png), then bundles them together with the current car photo into a single item the AI step can work with.

### ③ AI Studio Compositing (Gemini 2.5 Flash Image)
Builds a single multimodal prompt with all three images attached, sends it to Gemini, then extracts the generated image from the response. This is where the shot classification (Exterior / Interior / Engine), background swap, and license-plate-to-logo replacement all happen in one model call.

### ④ Save & Continue
Uploads the finished photo to the Output folder, named `<original-filename>_studio.jpg`, then loops back to process the next car photo.

### Input — Raw Lot Photo

*This is the original car photo, taken directly on the lot or at an auction — no studio, no staging.*

![Before — Raw car photo](https://res.cloudinary.com/avis-resources/image/upload/v1783364125/before_car_qm62f6.jpg)

### Output — Studio-Quality Result

*Gemini composites the car into the branded showroom backdrop with realistic lighting and reflections.*

![After — Studio result](https://res.cloudinary.com/avis-resources/image/upload/v1783364302/after_car_ecvzx4.png)

### Studio Backdrop Reference

*Place your own `virtual_studio.png` in the Studio Assets folder. Gemini uses this as the compositing background. Any branded showroom image works.*

![Virtual Studio backdrop](https://res.cloudinary.com/avis-resources/image/upload/v1783364301/virtual_studio_vyknbu.png)

### 🎬 Demo Walkthrough

*Watch the full end-to-end demo — from raw lot photo to studio-ready listing image in one automated run.*

*@[youtube](Sde4_BZDVPU)*
